description: To bring to completion; to realize fully what was intended or promised. 'Korei' names the completing—potential becoming actual, promise becoming reality.
sound_symbolism: The word completes with resonance. 'Ko' gathers with concentrated wholeness, elements combining. 'Re' resonates with accomplishment spreading. Then 'i' rises to completion achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as verb: 'mi korei' (I fulfill). Takes object being fulfilled. Related to 'heno' (satisfy) but emphasizes completion over contentment.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Fulfilled potential—communities enabling all members to realize their capacities.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Fulfillment as process—the completing that comes through practice, not grasping at results.
